name: Cala Mitjana
description: A wide cove of pale sand and clear water, framed by cliffs that some use to leap into the sea. Near Cala Galdana, it pairs beauty with reasonable access.

practicalInfo.acceso: Easy walk (~15 min) from the car park through pine woods
practicalInfo.aparcamiento: Free car park that fills early in high season
practicalInfo.servicios: No facilities: bring everything you need
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: June and September; in August, early
